feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day, plus Polish public-holiday reminders

entry.title: The Uplift: The American Dream
entry.content: We celebrate the United States ahead of its 250th anniversary with stories about American heroes and pastimes. The founder of e.l.f. Cosmetics shares how he made a massive life change to become a Catholic priest.

entry.title: WNBA All-Star Weekend schedule 2026: Times, TV channels, lineups for 3-Point Contest, Skills Challenge and more
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about the 2026 WNBA All-Star Weekend, including TV channel and streaming options for each event.

entry.title: Al Hilal agree deal with West Ham for Crysencio Summerville
entry.content: Al Hilal have agreed a deal with West Ham United to sign winger Crysencio Summerville, according to The Athletic.Both clubs have agreed a deal worth an initial £55 million, with a further £5m in add...

entry.title: Felipe Mora scores in stoppage time to help Timbers escape with 2-2 draw against Dallas
entry.content: Felipe Mora scored two minutes into stoppage time to erase a late go-ahead goal by Dallas' Petar Musa and help the Portland Timbers earn a 2-2 draw on Wednesday night. Mora took a pass from Kristoffer Velde before scoring his second goal of the season for the equalizer for Portland (5-8-3). Velde subbed into the match in the 55th minute before posting his career-high third assist.

entry.title: What Can Sunderland Hope To Gain From Their USA Tour?
entry.content: As the Lads head across the Atlantic, we asked our writers for their thoughts on what they’d like to see!

entry.title: Bay Area sports calendar, July 23-24
entry.content: Defending champion Padraig Harrington is among 156 golfers entered in the 2026 U.S. Senior Open. Coverage begins at 5:30 a.m. Thursday on the Golf Channel.

entry.title: Opposition Focus: Can Sunderland Show Some Pre-Season Promise Against Liverpool?
entry.content: Ahead of Saturday night’s clash in the Music City, Lewis Forbister runs the rule over our opponents!

entry.title: WNBA fans make AI allegations over Caitlin Clark’s image on NBA 2K27 Deluxe Edition
entry.content: NBA 2K’s new Caitlin Clark announcement doesn’t sit well with basketball fans. Indiana Fever superstar Caitlin Clark has once again proven that she’s the face of the WNBA with a recent collaboration with video-gaming giant NBA 2K.

entry.title: Man shot and killed by police in Madison, Wisconsin, sparking protests
entry.content: Madison's chief of police says an officer in Wisconsin's capital city shot and killed a man who had injured him with a knife while resisting arrest.

entry.title: Man embraces remote work by setting up offices at the beach, baseball game
entry.content: A California man is taking advantage of remote work with viral office settings that are attracting fans, critics, and thousands of views. Gwen Baumgarder joined him for a workday at the ballpark.

entry.title: Comforting news for coffee drinkers concerned about their heart health
entry.content: When it comes to heart health.. how many cups of caffeinated coffee are safe to drink each day? A new statement from the American Heart Association may be reassuring to coffee drinkers. Gwen Baumgardner has more.

entry.title: House committee urges DOJ to charge former Trump prosecutor Jack Smith
entry.content: The GOP chair of the House Judiciary Committee encouraged the DOJ to look into criminally charging Jack Smith, alleging the former special counsel who brought charges against President Trump lied to Congress.

entry.title: U.S. carries out more Iran strikes as threats to oil trade deepen
entry.content: President Trump threatened to bomb an Iranian bridge or power plant for every ship attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, as one shipping insider says "nothing is going through."

entry.title: Carmelo Anthony singles out Meleek Thomas as the most impressive rookie at Summer League
entry.content: Meleek Thomas is already proving the teams that passed over him wrong with his Summer League performance.

entry.title: Amish Shah projected to win Arizona's 1st District Democratic primary
entry.content: Democrat Amish Shah will be up against Republican Jay Feely in Arizona's 1st Congressional District in November.

entry.title: Darryn Peterson wanted to send a message during NBA Summer League with the foul limit
entry.content: Darryn Peterson had a lot of fun with a unique NBA Summer League rule.

entry.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall on Gulf Coast. See its path.
entry.content: Tropical Storm Bertha is the second named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season.

entry.title: National Guard deployed after West Virginia flash floods dump 7 inches of rain
entry.content: Torrential rains in West Virginia have caused flash flooding that inundated homes and businesses this week.

entry.title: Caitlin Clark adds special Chicago appearance to WNBA All-Star weekend schedule
entry.content: Caitlin Clark declined an invitation to the WNBA 3-Point Contest, but the Fever star has added another major appearance to her All-Star weekend schedule.

entry.title: Sophie Cunningham shares special moment with Brittney Griner before Fever-Sun game
entry.content: Sophie Cunningham and Brittney Griner put the competition aside for a special reunion before the Indiana Fever hosted the Connecticut Sun.

entry.title: Mauricio Pochettino replacements: Ranking the USMNT's candidates, from Pep Guardiola to Pellegrino Matarazzo
entry.content: Now that the 2026 FIFA World Cup has concluded, the future of USMNT head coach Mauricio Pochettino is now up in the air. If the esteemed coach leaves U.S. Soccer, who could replace him?

entry.title: A.J. Brown issued major warning ahead of first season with New England Patriots
entry.content: Brown is facing some serious pressure in his new NFL home.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
He who throws mud loses ground.
Lucky Numbers: 35, 15, 43, 40, 39, 1

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: If you need to fill up a bucket that won't fit under your faucet, use a pool noodle. Set the bucket on the floor, slip the pool noodle over the faucet and run it down to the bucket.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: Sex is biochemically no different from eating large quantities of chocolate.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Steve Harvey
entry.content: “You have the potential for greatness.” — Steve Harvey

entry.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
entry.content: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

entry.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of U.S. troops
entry.content: The President was at Dover Air Force Base in Delaware today for the dignified transfer of four military personnel killed in recent days in the Middle East as attacks between the U.S. and Iran have escalated. One of the families of the fallen then flew home to Georgia aboard Air Force One with President Trump. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

entry.title: Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt's daughter Vivienne asks court to drop her dad's last name
entry.content: Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie's youngest daughter, Vivienne, is petitioning to drop her father's last name from her official name.

entry.title: Nolan Wells preliminary autopsy results released
entry.content: A forensic pathologist hired by the family of Nolan Wells says so far the cause and manner of death is undetermined. The autopsy was performed four days after his body was found. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist has the story.

entry.title: U.S. Surges Forces Toward Middle East, Giving Trump Options to Expand Iran War
entry.content: The influx of troops, medics and weaponry follows the deaths of three U.S. soldiers in an Iranian attack at a base in Jordan.

entry.title: Check out this nifty 3D Playdate game demo
entry.content: Adding new dimensions to the device.

entry.title: Steam adds handy gifting and wishlist updates
entry.content: You can now gift games without a Steam account and sort your wishlist into categories.

entry.title: Why U.S. TV viewers fell in love with the 2026 World Cup
entry.content: Fox and Telemundo saw strong audience levels topped only by the Super Bowl.

entry.title: Trump hypes Mike Collins’ Senate campaign at Georgia rally
entry.content: GOP Rep. Mike Collins is taking on Sen. Jon Ossoff, a well-funded Democrat, in a key battleground race.

entry.title: Mexican American cinema exhibit coming to Academy Museum in Fall 2027
entry.content: The Academy Museum of Motion Pictures announced that it will open a exhibition celebrating Mexican and Mexican American film history in September 2027.

entry.title: Napheesa Collier returns to Lynx with 24-point, 10-rebound performance during win over Storm
entry.content: Collier had been out since September following offseason ankle surgeries.

entry.title: Captain Salt leads Fire to victory against Brave
entry.content: Welsh Fire captain Phil Salt leads from the front as his unbeaten 47 helps them begin the 2026 Hundred season with a six-wicket win against Southern Brave in Southampton.

entry.title: Netflix Set To Livestream MLB’s 2026 ‘Field Of Dreams’ Game In August
entry.content: Major League Baseball’s "Field of Dreams" game — set amid the cornfields of Iowa where Kevin Costner’s famed movie baseball field originated — will be available to watch live on Netflix in mid-August.

entry.title: Tony Thorpe, glam-rock guitarist for the Rubettes, dead at 80
entry.content: The Rubettes formed in 1973 after a session-musician team cut several doo-wop inspired tracks including the single "Sugar Baby Love."

entry.title: How to buy Notre Dame Fighting Irish college football tickets, full schedule
entry.content: With football coming up in a matter of weeks, Notre Dame Fighting Irish tickets are available for every game. Here's how to buy:

entry.title: Chelsea Are Showing Interest In This Talented Full-Back: Should Alonso Get Him On Board?
entry.content: In a recent report, journalist Graeme Bailey revealed that Chelsea are showing interest in Fenerbahce full-back Archie Brown this summer. It is understood that the Blues are facing competition in the ...

entry.title: CBF wants VAR to adopt a new approach in the Brasileirão, explained
entry.content: The CBF refereeing committee wants a new approach from VAR in Brazilian soccer matches.According to a UOL report published this Wednesday (22), the aim is for the tool to intervene only in obvious err...

entry.title: Can Scottie Scheffler repeat as PGA Player of the Year?
entry.content: Scottie Scheffler leads the FedEx Cup, but major winners and multiple victors are challenging him for the top award.

entry.title: Indiana Fever vs Connecticut Sun live score: Is Caitlin Clark playing tonight? How to watch
entry.content: It's the final game before the WNBA All-Star break and the three Fever All-Star starters look to impress upon their home crowd.

entry.title: A year after Malcolm-Jamal Warner's death, widow Tenisha Warner sues actor's mother for $1.2 million
entry.content: Malcolm-Jamal Warner's widow and his mother are locked in a lawsuit over $1.2 million, a year after 'The Cosby Show' star accidentally drowned on vacation at age 54.

entry.title: US outlines its $5 billion Genesis Mission to boost science with AI
entry.content: Several federal agencies are contributing toward the interdisciplinary research efforts.

entry.title: 'Stuart Fails to Save the Universe' is an out-of-this-world comedy
entry.content: The latest spinoff from 'The Big Bang Theory' takes secondary characters and places them in a sci-fi adventure comedy filled with small details that bring the story alive.

entry.title: Ryan Gosling's 'La La Hand' is finally fixed in the new 'La La Land' poster
entry.content: Lionsgate has changed Ryan Gosling's flat hand gesture on the poster for 'La La Land' as the musical celebrates its 10th anniversary.

entry.title: Need backup power? Automakers want you to look no further than their vehicles in your driveway
entry.content: Winter Storm Uri, the multiday freeze that slammed Texas in February 2021 and pummeled the state's power grid, has been on Kenneth Kovar's mind ever since. Though the resident of New Braunfels, northeast of San Antonio, didn't lose power at the time, he wasn't able to run his septic tank - it is independent from local systems. He had to fill his toilets with water from his backyard pool.

entry.title: AP Exclusive: A boater's photo may be 'the last picture' of group drowned in an Ohio river
entry.content: AP Exclusive: A boater's photo may be 'the last picture' of group drowned in an Ohio river

entry.title: 'The last picture': A passing boater's photograph may be the 5 adults who drowned in Ohio
entry.content: Marcus L. Martin felt instant trepidation Sunday when he saw five adults wading hip- and waist-deep in the Scioto River. A frequent boater on the Ohio waterway, the Baptist pastor knew the area where they were standing to be treacherous. He believes the people he captured in a photo to be the ill-fated group that drowned that day.

entry.title: Exclusive-Iran strikes on CIA facilities prompt questions about possible Russian role
entry.content: Exclusive-Iran strikes on CIA facilities prompt questions about possible Russian role

entry.title: Portland ballot initiative to increase police staffing accused of misleading voters
entry.content: A Portland, Oregon, ballot initiative intended to divert surplus climate funds to boost police hiring has been dogged by accusations that canvassers are misleading voters to get their signatures -- an allegation proponents of the measure said is part of an organized campaign to taint their effort.

entry.title: National Guard deploys as flash floods in West Virginia inundate homes and businesses
entry.content: Torrential rains caused flash floods in West Virginia that inundated homes and businesses, washed out bridges and led to numerous water rescues, authorities said. The governor said there were no reports of deaths or missing people as of Wednesday.

entry.title: June 1 trial date set for Venezuela's Nicolas Maduro in his U.S. drug trafficking case
entry.content: Former Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro and his wife will go on trial on drug trafficking charges next June, a judge said Wednesday, as their lawyers continue to object to the U.S. military action that snatched them from power.

entry.title: A strange transmissible cancer is spreading through the catfish in this lake
entry.content: For more than a decade, there's been something fishy going on in a lake that straddles Vermont and the province of Quebec. It involves cancer, a kind of catfish, and — possibly — clues about how tumors metastasize.

entry.title: Trump Attends Dignified Transfer for U.S. Servicemembers Killed in Middle East
entry.content: It is the third such event that the president has attended since the start of the war with Iran.

entry.title: Endangered right whales could wait almost a decade for new U.S. protections
entry.content: New protections for endangered right whales in the North Atlantic would be postponed for nearly a decade under a plan that cleared a key hurdle in Washington last week with the full-throated support of the fishing and lobster industries.

entry.title: In pursuit of 'Instagram face,' are we losing the imperfections that make us human?
entry.content: Plastic surgery is becoming so normalized and undetectable, it's changing our relationship to reality. The New Yorker staff writer Jia Tolentino considers how beauty standards have dovetailed with AI.

entry.title: U.S. Attorney's office announces seizure of over $25M in cryptocurrency tied to global fraud
entry.content: The U.S. Attorney's Office for the District of Columbia said Tuesday that it has seized over $25 million in cryptocurrency linked to multiple international fraud investigations.

entry.title: Rei Ami from 'KPop Demon Hunters' and comedian Ken Jeong take a bite out of 'Shark Week'
entry.content: Rei Ami, whose voice helped fuel the hit movie "KPop Demon Hunters," recently found herself facing plenty of real hunters - watching from the ocean floor as about 16 reef sharks went on a feeding frenzy.

entry.title: Saudi Nuclear Deal: Five Things to Know
entry.content: The accord approved by President Trump opens the door to uranium enrichment in the kingdom.

entry.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
entry.content: James Capon responds to an editorial on the health select committee’s call for radical action to regulate food marketsThe MPs’ report mentioned in your editorial is welcome and overdue (The Guardian view on obesity: put public health before food industry pressure, 15 July). The health select committee is right to clarify that obesity is an engineered outcome, not a failure of willpower. But there’s a flaw running through decades of British food policy that risks being repeated: the “high in fat, salt or sugar” framework itself.“High in fat, salt or sugar” combines three nutrients as though they carry equivalent blame. However, the evidence on weight gain and type 2 diabetes points to sugar and refined carbohydrates as the primary drivers, not fat. Salt matters, chiefly when combined with sugar, but the body needs salt to function. Fat matters because without it many fat-soluble vitamins will just pass through our bodies. We need no sugar at all. Continue reading...

entry.title: Trump Approves Landmark Nuclear Deal With Saudi Arabia in Big Win for Kingdom
entry.content: The deal could mean large profits for American companies but also is likely to raise concerns about nuclear proliferation in the Middle East.

entry.title: This familiar connection could fuel the next big Cardinals trade
entry.content: This LHP could be a great addition for St. Louis.

entry.title: Texans reveal Woody Marks, David Montgomery plans that could confuse fantasy football RB rankings
entry.content: Houston has two talented running backs to choose from.

entry.title: Mavericks predicted to flip Klay Thompson for $99M ex-Warriors NBA champion in mega 3-team deal
entry.content: Klay Thompson's name has been involved in the trade rumor swirl. In this potential deal he is shipped in a three-team blockbuster.

entry.content: Klay Thompson's name has been involved in the trade rumor swirl. In this potential deal he is shipped in a three-team blockbuster.

entry.title: Grizzlies Cam Boozer, Cedric Coward score summer league honors
entry.content: Memphis Grizzlies rookie Cam Boozer was named an All-NBA Summer League first-team selection on July 21.

entry.title: Jack Rowlett placed on injured reserve, expected to miss four to six weeks
entry.content: Carolina Chaos defenseman Jack Rowlett has been placed on injured reserve after suffering an upper-body injury in the first quarter of Saturday’s 10-8 loss to the Denver Outlaws that required...

entry.title: Why NBA fans think Heat fired director of YouTube strategy after LeBron James press conference mistake
entry.content: Here's the rundown on whether or not Miami let their director of YouTube strategy go.

entry.title: Blue Jays and Yankees could win AL East by making this one trade, but one has to show they want it more
entry.content: A bidding war could be brewing.

entry.title: Blue Jays and Yankees could win AL East by making this one trade, but one has to show they want it more
entry.content: A bidding war could be brewing.

entry.title: Bring on your best Buffalo Bills tailgating ideas
entry.content: Give me your recipe ideas so I can steal and then butcher them

entry.title: Royals trade for ex-Blue Jays, Astros 3.60 ERA righty reliever
entry.content: The Royals are adding a 3.60 ERA righty reliever in a trade with the Astros.

entry.title: 19 home run shortstop being viewed as potential trade option for Yankees and Blue Jays to determine AL East
entry.content: Could there be a bidding war brewing in the AL East?

entry.title: Trump Says U.S. Will Bomb Iran’s Power Plants, Bridges if Tehran Strikes Ships
entry.content: The president’s threat is the latest indication that he is planning to escalate the conflict.

entry.title: PCB makes padel mandatory for Pakistan cricketers at National Cricket Academy
entry.content: The Pakistan Cricket Board has made padel a mandatory part of training at the National Cricket Academy, with players required to play 40-minute sessions every alternate day. The move aims to improve fitness, agility and fielding. The PCB has also added a padel court, installed an AI bowling machine, and plans to build basketball and indoor sports facilities.

entry.title: What happened to the case of David Rozman, the Ineos carer with alleged links to a notorious doping doctor?
entry.content: Rozman was sent home from the 2025 Tour de France but is back working for Sir Dave Brailsford’s Netcompany-Ineos cycling team

entry.title: Don’t sleep on Ashton Jeanty’s impact in this area
entry.content: Running back showed ability as a pass catcher as a rookie

entry.title: ESPN Cans Ryan Clark Mid-Broadcast, Adding To Pattern Of Black Talent Departures
entry.content: ESPN has ended its relationship with Emmy Award-winning NFL analyst Ryan Clark, highlighting ongoing instability in major sports media. The mid-broadcast decision on July 20 marks another notable departure of...

entry.title: Survey: Which camp battle do you most want to see?
entry.content: Which battle are you looking forward to when the NY Giants open camp?

entry.title: Remembering the life of Yordano Ventura
entry.content: It’s hard to believe that this coming January will mark ten years. I remember when I heard the news. It hit me like a slug hitting a deer. I had to sit for a few minutes, reading and re-reading the story. My brain refused to believe that the news was true, but eventually reality set […]

entry.title: Braves Minor League Recap: Ronald Acuna Jr. Singles in Rehab
entry.content: Acuna had three hard hit balls and played seven innings in right field

entry.title: From a Former Raven: why the goalposts keep moving on Lamar Jackson
entry.content: It’s time to reframe the narrative around Lamar Jackson, writes former Ravens Super Bowl champion Femi Ayanbadejo.

entry.title: Powerball ticket sales begin Tuesday in the United Kingdom
entry.content: Powerball ticket sales in the United Kingdom will begin Tuesday, allowing players there to compete for the same massive jackpots as U.S. players

entry.title: Blackstone Rolls Out New Private-Market Funds—This Time With Vanguard
entry.content: The new offerings for individual investors follow an exodus from private credit funds earlier this year.

entry.title: U.S. Data-Center Operator TECfusions Plans to Go Public in $4 Billion SPAC Deal
entry.content: The Florida-based company, which hosts one of the largest AMD-based AI training clusters in North America, is set to combine with Apex Treasury listed in New York.

entry.title: Wrexham to appoint Newcastle's Nickson as sporting director
entry.content: Steve Nickson is poised to leave his role as head of recruitment at Newcastle United to become sporting director of Championship club Wrexham.

entry.title: Liverpool issue bans as £1.2m seized from ticket touts
entry.content: Liverpool issue hundreds of lifetime bans after more than £1.2m of assets relating to the illegal selling of tickets was seized by police.

entry.title: Dayton Dragons overcome 6-run deficit to beat Cedar Rapids in 10 innings
entry.content: The Dayton Dragons overcame a big deficit to win in extra innings on Tuesday night.

entry.title: Listen to Ciara Mageean on The GAA Social
entry.content: The GAA Social sits down with European champion runner Ciara Mageean, who was diagnosed with cancer last year.

entry.title: Brownlee to return for 2026 Supertri Jersey
entry.content: Three-time Olympic triathlon medallist Jonny Brownlee is confirmed among a world-class field for 2026 Jersey Supertri.

entry.title: Analyst highlights 3 pitfalls facing 2026 Jacksonville Jaguars
entry.content: Looking to build upon a very good 2025 season, there are three pitfalls that the Jaguars have to overcome this year.

entry.title: CBS Sports predicts an average finish for Texas A&M in 2026
entry.content: CBS Sports' Brad Crawford predicts that Texas A&M will finish 8-4 with losses to LSU, Alabama, Oklahoma, and, yes, the Texas Longhorns.
